## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss blog content strategy, SEO optimization, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Initiating blog audit to remove/redirect irrelevant content, potentially boosting overall SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Implementing new automated blog ingestion process using XML files and WP All Import plugin](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Increasing publishing velocity by involving more team members in content review process](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Early traction seen in newly published content, with 4 clicks and 3000+ impressions in the past week](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

## Topics

### Blog Content Audit

  - [Identified \~400 URLs for review, with 27 already marked for redirection](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Goal: Remove outdated/irrelevant content to improve overall site SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Process: Quick assessment of relevance (No/Somewhat/Yes) for each URL](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Next steps: Redirect obvious irrelevant content, then develop playbooks for refreshing/combining/updating remaining content](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### AMP Page Deprecation

  - [Recommendation to deprecate AMP (Accelerated Mobile Pages) versions of blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Rationale: Improved site speed metrics, low AMP traffic (100 clicks in 3 months), reduced technical debt](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Action: Mark to confirm with team and implement deprecation](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)

### Content Performance Tracking

  - [New performance report created in Google Data Studio](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Shows early traction: 4 clicks, 3000+ impressions for 7 newly published pieces](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [GA4 data to be incorporated once analytics issues are resolved](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)

### Publishing Workflow Improvements

  - [New automated ingestion process using WP All Import plugin and XML files](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [GrowthX to output approved blogs as XML files for easier import](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Kirkland (IT) to implement workflow in AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Mark unable to review all content alone; recruiting team members for help](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Kristin to provide list of team members and their subject matter expertise](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Goal: Assign \~1 blog per week to each team member for review](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### CTA Implementation

  - [Generic CTAs provided by Mark are being added to new and recent blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)

### Miscellaneous

  - [UK English consistency to be double-checked in content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Publishing target: 8 articles per week, \~1500 words each (50,000 words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [New Chief Content Officer (Matthew Panzarino) joined GrowthX, focusing on workflow improvements and content quality](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark & Kristin: Complete first pass of content relevance assessment (150 URLs/week)](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Aida: Add images to blogs missing them](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Kristin: Provide list of team members and their subject matter expertise for content review](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Mark: Wait for update from Kirkland on XML workflow implementation](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [GrowthX: Continue implementing generic CTAs in new content](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [Aida: Ensure consistent use of UK English in content generation](https://fathom.video/share/R-qTMdat1NTgH1uUpxuevKQasyAzfEy7?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
